# Pulumi config key reference

Every Pulumi config key this scanner can resolve, grouped by namespace (see the "Known gap" note in cmd/configdoc/main.go for what it can't see). Set one with `pulumi config set <namespace>:<key> <value>` or `-c <namespace>:<key>=<value>`.
